global_description: Elongated, segmented body with vibrant colors, often green or brown, covered in fine hairs or spines. Multiple pairs of short, stubby legs along the underside, small head with simple eyes and tiny antennae, soft and flexible texture.

part_details.head: Small with simple eyes and tiny antennae
part_details.body: Elongated, segmented, often vibrant with fine hairs or spines
part_details.legs: Multiple pairs of short, stubby legs along underside
